title: Array Technologies Q4 2024 Earnings Watch
text:
Array Technologies Q4 2024 Earnings Watch

Release Date: February 27, 2025

Q4 2024 Estimates:
- Revenue consensus: $268.47 million
- EPS consensus: $0.07 per share

Full-Year 2024 Projections:
- Revenue expected: $910.36 million
- EPS expected: -$0.96 per share

Recent Estimate Trends:
Revenue forecasts have declined slightly over the past 90 days, dropping from $913.97 million to $910.36 million for 2024. Similarly, 2025 earnings estimates decreased from $0.41 to $0.36 per share.

Previous Quarter Performance:
In Q3 2024, Array Technologies missed revenue expectations by 0.52%, with actual revenue of $231.41 million versus the anticipated $232.61 million. The company reported earnings of -$1.02 per share, significantly underperforming analyst expectations of $0.026 per share.

Analyst Outlook:
With an average one-year price target of $10.29, analysts project approximately 56% upside potential from the current stock price of $6.59.
